title: Shayoto

{{Quote|Does anybody remember the ''Vultar Cataclysm''? Or the ''Gank Massacres''? I do! I have lived a ''very long'' time.|Shayoto|<ref name="darklords3" />}}
'''Shayoto''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] active in the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] leading up to the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. Born [[Time/Legends|sometime]] before the year [[4800 BBY]], Shayoto was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Code/Legends|way]] by a [[Shayoto's master|long-lived Jedi Master]], who in turn had a [[Shayoto's master's master|Master]] who lived for thousands of years. Shayoto was also instructed by his Master's Master, who taught him about events such as the [[Hundred-Year Darkness/Legends|Hundred-Year Darkness]] and the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]], and about the ''modus operandi'' of the [[Darksider|followers]] of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. After completing his Jedi training and rising to the level of Jedi Master, Shayoto lived through the [[Gank Massacres]] in 4800 BBY and the [[Vultar Cataclysm]] in [[4250 BBY]]. By [[3997 BBY]], the Jedi Master had lived for more than 800 years. That same year, Shayoto attended the [[Conclave at Deneba]], a [[Jedi Convocation|Jedi meeting]] on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Deneba/Legends|Deneba]] meant to address the recent threat posed by the [[Empress Teta/Legends|Empress Teta]]–based [[Sith cult/Legends|dark-side organization]] known as the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]]. The aging Jedi Master made himself heard during the conclave, sharing his knowledge of the workings of darksiders. During a recess, the Jedi gathered on Deneba's [[Mount Meru (Deneba)|Mount Meru]] were [[Battle of Deneba|attacked]] by [[Krath war droid/Legends|Krath war droids]]. However, the assembled Jedi were able to fight the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Army/Legends|army]] off.

==Biography==
{{Quote|My master's master told me about the ''Hundred-Year Darkness''…and the ''Great Hyperspace War''. He taught me how the agents of the ''dark side'' do their work.|Shayoto|<ref name="darklords3" />}}
Shayoto, a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], was born some [[Time/Legends|time]] before<ref name="darklords3" /> [[4800 BBY]],<ref name="date" /> and eventually was found to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]]. He joined the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and was placed under the tutelage of a [[Shayoto's master|very old Jedi Master]]. Shayoto was also taught by [[Shayoto's master's master|his Master's Master]], who told him about the events of the [[Hundred-Year Darkness/Legends|Hundred-Year Darkness]] and the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]], which the ancient [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] had lived through. Shayoto's Master's Master also taught him how the agents of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] operated, relating how [[darksider]]s acted in secrecy and waited until the leaders of society had fallen under their grasp, before striking with great suddenness. After completing his [[Jedi training/Legends|training]], Shayoto rose to the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. He went on to live for many [[Standard year/Legends|centuries]], surviving through the [[Gank Massacres]] in<ref name="darklords3" /> 4800 BBY,<ref name="nec">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> and the [[Vultar Cataclysm]]<ref name="darklords3" /> [[4250 BBY|550 years later]].<ref name="nec" />

[[File:Conclave_on_Deneba.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Jedi Knights approach Mount Meru, where the Conclave on Deneba was held. Shayoto attended this meeting.]]
In [[3997 BBY]],<ref name="nec" /> a [[Conclave at Deneba|conclave]] of Jedi on the<ref name="darklords3" /> [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]<ref name="tea">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Deneba/Legends|Deneba]] was called to deal with several events that had recently transpired. A [[Sith cult/Legends|dark-side-wielding group]] known as the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] had [[Political uprising of the Empress Teta system|seized power]] in the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]] and declared war on the Jedi Order. By that time, Shayoto had lived for more than 800 years, but that did not stop the aging Jedi Master from going to Deneba. A large crowd of Jedi, including Shayoto, attended the [[Jedi Convocation|gathering]] on Deneba's [[Mount Meru (Deneba)|Mount Meru]]. During the conclave, the Jedi tried to find a way to neutralize the Krath threat. Eventually, the young [[Jedi Watchman/Legends|Jedi Watchman]] of the Tetan worlds, [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]], was called to the stage, claiming that an all-out war with the Krath would not eliminate the true dark-side threat. After hearing this, Shayoto asked to speak, and although he had not been recognized by Master [[Odan-Urr/Legends|Odan-Urr]], the conclave's spokesman, fellow Jedi Master [[Arca Jeth]] proclaimed that Shayoto should be allowed to address the other Jedi.<ref name="darklords3" />

Shayoto told the assembled Jedi Knights his memory of the events of the past; the Hundred-Year Darkness, Great Hyperspace War, Gank Massacres, and the Vultar Cataclysm, and conveyed to them his knowledge of the methods of darksiders. The aged Jedi Master made the point that the Krath conspiracy should be torn out by its roots before it could spread beyond the [[Teta/Legends|Empress Teta]] [[Star system/Legends|system]]. Qel-Droma agreed and proposed that he infiltrate the Krath organization and learn their secrets, an idea that did not sit well with the gathered Jedi. Jeth, in particular, was strongly opposed, fearing that Qel-Droma would fall to the dark side himself if he attempted such a plan. A recess was then called, and before the conclave could resume, the Jedi were [[Battle of Deneba|ambushed]] by hundreds of [[Life pod chamber|life pods]] containing [[Krath war droid/Legends|Krath war droids]] launched from [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]]. Now under siege, the assembled Jedi were forced to fight the war [[Droid/Legends|droids]] off, and after a fierce battle, they were successful. However, many Jedi, including Arca Jeth, were [[Death/Legends|killed]].<ref name="darklords3" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|The dark siders act in ''complete'' secrecy, until the leaders of society have fallen to their evil seductions. Then they strike with great suddenness, bringing down civilizations it took ''aeons'' to build.|Shayoto|<ref name="darklords3" />}}
Over the course of many centuries, Shayoto, through the teachings of his Master and his Master's Master, accrued a great knowledge of [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Timeline of galactic history/Legends|history]], the conflicts between the [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light]] and the dark sides of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], and the workings of agents of the dark side. The Jedi Master did not hesitate to share his knowledge with the rest of the Jedi Order, as he did during the Conclave on Deneba. Although by the time of the conclave Shayoto was over 800 years old, he was still spry enough to attend, hiking all the way up Mount Meru. Shayoto demonstrated a measure of boldness, as he stepped forward to speak during the Jedi meeting, although he had not been recognized yet by the meeting's spokesman, Odan-Urr. However, Shayoto was respected enough that Arca Jeth, a well-respected Jedi Master, believed that he should be allowed to state his points anyway. The centuries-old Jedi Master resented the dark side of the Force and its followers, seeing them as evil, and blaming them for the fall of many civilizations, some of which took eons to build. At the time of the Conclave on Deneba, Shayoto's skin was wrinkled, and he had a hunched posture and walked with a large cane.<ref name="darklords3" />

==Behind the scenes==
Shayoto first appeared in [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi - Dark Lords of the Sith'']], the fourth story arc of the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series, written by [[Kevin J. Anderson]] and [[Tom Veitch]] from late [[1994]] to early [[1995]]. Shayoto appeared in the arc's [[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 3|third issue]], titled ''Descent to the Dark Side'', wherein he played a minor role. Shayoto did not appear nor was he mentioned in any other issues in the arc, and it is his only appearance in [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]. In his appearance, Shayoto was illustrated by [[Chris Gossett]].<ref name="darklords3" />

Although Shayoto appeared in the comic version of ''Dark Lords of the Sith'', the Jedi Master was absent from the [[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio drama)|''Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]]. In the audio version, Shayoto's lines were attributed to Arca Jeth.<ref name="audio">[[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]]</ref>
